synergies.teammate_name: The House of Spiders: The Ring Nursefather Hong Lu
synergies.reason: 'Please, Do Stop Running and Be Seated' inflicts Bleed via the support passive — scales off Bleed count/potency on the target.
'Nice and Slow, Don't Let It Break…' inflicts Bleed via the support passive — scales off Bleed count/potency on the target.
'It flows and cries' inflicts Bleed via the support passive — scales off Bleed count/potency on the target.
'Aiming for the Bullseye' inflicts Bleed via the support passive — scales off Bleed count/potency on the target.
'Endless Lamentation' inflicts Sinking via the support passive — scales off Sinking count/potency on the target.

core_idea: The Ring Fauvist Student Meursault is a Damage Dealer / Status Specialist — damage scales with the number of debuff types on the target. Stack varied statuses before committing high-value skills. Scaling conditions: +5% per negative effect type (max +15%); +5% per negative effect type (max +20%).
playstyle_guide:
- Skills check **6+ Bleed** — favour those coins when stacked.
- Reach scaling conditions before committing S3: +5% per negative effect type (max +15%).
- Stack several distinct status types on the target before using high-power skills — each debuff type adds to damage.
- S3 carries Unbreakable Coin — commit it when the clash strongly favors you.

**S1 — Rough Portrayal** (BP 3, CP +4, x2): rolls — low 3, high 11 (Extremely Low / Average stacked).
- Each debuff type on the target adds +5% damage (up to +15%) — stack statuses broadly.
- +5% per negative effect type (max +15%)

**S2 — Visceral Strokes** (BP 4, CP +4, x3): rolls — low 4, high 16 (Slightly Low / Slightly High stacked).
- Each debuff type on the target adds +5% damage (up to +20%) — stack statuses broadly.
- +5% per negative effect type (max +20%)

**S3 — Le Fauvisme - Reveal Submission** (BP 5, CP +4, x3): rolls — low 5, high 17 (Average / Slightly High stacked).
- Each debuff type on the target adds +10% damage (up to +60%) — stack statuses broadly.
- +10% per negative effect type (max +60%)
- converts coins to Unbreakable under condition
- Inflict +2 Bleed Count; [On Hit] Inflict +2 Sinking Count

Combat passive — **The Ring Fauvist Student**: On Hit with a Base Skill: Inflict 1 Mauled Color — Rouge —.
  - This counts as "inflicting negative effects with the Skill".
  - Turn End: If this unit has inflicted 10+ Mauled Color — Rouge — during this Encounter, gain Le Fauvisme — Masque de Chien.

Combat passive — **Welling Inspiration**: If this unit has Le Fauvisme — Masque de Chien, inflict +1 Mauled Color — Rouge —.
  - Every time this unit inflicts 4 Mauled Color — Rouge —, heal 5 SP (2 times per turn).
  - If this unit's SP is at max, gain 1 Blunt DMG Up next turn when this unit heals SP with this effect (once per turn).

Defense skill — **Counter: Coloring Preparations**: [Clashable Counter].
  - If this unit has Le Fauvisme — Masque de Chien, Base Power +2.
  - [On Use] If target has 6+ (Bleed + Sinking), Coin Power +1.
team_suggestions: **Bleed** focus. Same-faction teammates provide additional passive synergy where available.
- **The House of Spiders: The Ring Nursefather Hong Lu**: 'Please, Do Stop Running and Be Seated' inflicts Bleed via the support passive — scales off Bleed count/potency on the target.
- **The Ring Fauvist Docent Rodion**: 'Nice and Slow, Don't Let It Break…' inflicts Bleed via the support passive — scales off Bleed count/potency on the target.
- **N Corp. E.G.O::Contempt, Awe Ryōshū**: 'It flows and cries' inflicts Bleed via the support passive — scales off Bleed count/potency on the target.
team_suggestion_intro: **Bleed** focus. Same-faction teammates provide additional passive synergy where available.
